translations.app.name: Draft
translations.autosave.description: Choose your preferred saving interval. Confirming activates Autosave.
translations.autosave.title: Activate Autosave
translations.dialog.openExternalLink.description:
Open this link in your default browser?
{url}
translations.dialog.openExternalLink.openFailed: The link could not be opened in your default browser.
translations.dialog.openExternalLink.title: Open External Link
translations.dialog.missingFileSave.description:
The original file was moved, renamed, or deleted outside Draft.

Draft will not recreate it automatically. Choose how to save the current document.

Original path:
{path}
translations.dialog.missingFileSave.title: File Location Missing
translations.dialog.openFile.title: Open File
translations.dialog.title: Dialog
translations.dialog.unsavedChanges.closeDescription: This file has unsaved changes or has not been saved yet. If you close now, all unsaved work will be lost. Do you really want to close Draft?
translations.dialog.unsavedChanges.continueDescriptio: You have unsaved changes. Do you want to continue?
translations.dialog.unsavedChanges.title: Unsaved Changes
translations.errors.autosaveCurrentFile: Unable to autosave the current file.
translations.errors.openStartupFile: Unable to open the startup file. {message}
translations.errors.saveCurrentFile: Unable to save the current file.
translations.errors.saveOnFocusLost: Unable to save the current file when Draft lost focus.
translations.export.completeDescription: The document was exported successfully as {format}.
translations.export.description: Choose the format for your exported document.
translations.export.pdfCouldNotComplete: The PDF export could not be completed.
translations.export.pdfWebViewRequired: A PDF export WebView is required.
translations.export.pngCaptureEmpty: The PNG export capture was empty.
translations.export.pngCouldNotBeCaptured: The PNG export could not be captured.
translations.export.pngCouldNotComplete: The PNG export could not be completed.
translations.export.pngPreviewCouldNotBePrepared: The PNG export preview could not be prepared: {message}
translations.export.pngPreviewTimeout: The PNG export preview did not finish rendering in time.
translations.export.pngSizeCouldNotBeMeasured: The PNG export document size could not be measured.
translations.export.pngTooLarge: The document is too large to export as a single PNG ({width} x {height} pixels). Try PDF or HTML export, or split the document into smaller sections.
translations.export.pngTooLargeToCapture: The PNG export document is too large to capture.
translations.export.pngTooWide: The document is too wide to export as a single PNG ({width} CSS pixels). Try PDF or HTML export, or reduce very wide content such as tables or code blocks.
translations.export.pngWebViewRequired: A PNG export WebView is required.
translations.export.previewHtmlCouldNotBeCreated: The preview export HTML could not be created.
translations.export.previewLoadFailed: The export preview could not be loaded: {status}.
translations.export.previewNotReady: The Markdown preview is not ready yet. Try exporting again after the workspace finishes loading.
translations.export.previewWebViewNotReady: The preview WebView is not ready.
translations.export.title: Export as
translations.export.unsupportedFormat: The selected export format is not supported.
translations.export.webViewHostNameRequired: A WebView host name is required.
translations.goToPosition.description: Enter a line, a line and column, or a column for the current line.
translations.goToPosition.error.columnOnly: For a column-only jump, enter : followed by a positive number.
translations.goToPosition.error.invalid: Enter a line as 14, a line and column as 15:53, or only a column as :44.
translations.goToPosition.error.linePositive: Line must be a positive number.
translations.goToPosition.title: Go to Position
translations.revertSave.autosaveUnavailableDescriptio: Autosave has not created a restore point for this file.
translations.revertSave.description: Restore from the last manual save or the last autosave.
translations.revertSave.manualUnavailableDescription: Save manually to create a restore point.
translations.revertSave.noAutosaveSnapshot: No autosave snapshot exists for this file.
translations.revertSave.noManualSnapshot: No manual save snapshot exists for this file.
translations.revertSave.openOrSaveFirst: Open or save a file before restoring a saved version.
translations.revertSave.restoreFailed: The selected saved version could not be restored.
translations.revertSave.title: Choose Version
translations.settings.about.tagline: A focused Markdown editor for writing, previewing, and saving clean Markdown documents in a calm desktop workspace.
translations.settings.appearance.appTheme.description: Choose whether Draft uses dark mode, light mode, or follows the system setting.
translations.settings.appearance.toolbarPosition.desc: Choose where the main controls should be placed.
translations.settings.develop.demoUpdateAvailableDesc: Draft 99.0.0-test is available. Install this update now? Draft will restart to finish installing.
translations.settings.develop.demoUpdateInstalledDesc: This is a development-only update demo. No update was installed.
translations.settings.develop.demoUpdateStatus.initia: Test card. Scan to simulate an available update.
translations.settings.develop.dialog.previewDescripti: This is a development preview dialog.
translations.settings.develop.errorDialog.previewDesc: This is a development preview of an error dialog.
translations.settings.develop.infoDialog.previewDescr: This is a development preview of an informational dialog.
translations.settings.develop.promptWindow.descriptio: Open the empty prompt window shell.
translations.settings.develop.successDialog.previewDe: This is a development preview of a success dialog.
translations.settings.develop.testUpdateCard.descript: Development-only test setting card. It always reports a fake update and never installs anything.
translations.settings.develop.warningDialog.previewDe: This is a development preview of a warning dialog.
translations.settings.editor.autoPairBrackets.descrip: Automatically insert closing brackets when typing opening brackets.
translations.settings.editor.autoPairQuotes.descripti: Automatically insert closing quotes when typing quotes.
translations.settings.editor.cursorBlinking.descripti: Animate the cursor with a blinking effect.
translations.settings.editor.cursorStyle.description: Choose the visual style of the editor cursor.
translations.settings.editor.fontSize.description: Adjust the text size inside the editor.
translations.settings.editor.highlightCurrentLine.des: Highlight the line where your cursor is currently placed.
translations.settings.editor.includeMarkdownSyntaxInC: Include Markdown syntax in character count
Count raw Markdown characters in the status bar character total.
translations.settings.editor.insertSpacesInsteadOfTab: Insert spaces when pressing Tab instead of using tab characters.
translations.settings.editor.lineHeight.description: Adjust the vertical spacing between editor lines.
translations.settings.editor.showIndentationGuides.de: Display vertical guide lines for indentation levels.
translations.settings.editor.showLineNumbers.descript: Display line numbers next to the editor content.
translations.settings.editor.tabSize.description: Choose how many spaces a tab should represent.
translations.settings.editor.wordWrap.description: Wrap long lines instead of scrolling horizontally.
translations.settings.general.associateTxtFiles.descr: Allow Draft to appear as an option for opening plain text files.
translations.settings.general.autosaveEnabled.descrip: Save your changes automatically while you work.
translations.settings.general.autosaveInterval.descri: Choose how often Draft should save changes automatically.
translations.settings.general.checkForUpdatesOnStartu: Automatically scan for Draft updates in the background whenever the app launches.
translations.settings.general.confirmBeforeClosingUns: Show a warning before closing files with unsaved changes.
translations.settings.general.defaultStartupMode.desc: Choose which workspace mode Draft should open with.
translations.settings.general.reopenLastWorkspace.des: Automatically restore the files and layout from your last session.
translations.settings.general.saveOnFocusLost.descrip: Save the current file when Draft loses focus or you switch away from the app.
Controls how small the main window is allowed to become.
translations.settings.language.description: Choose the language used by Draft.
translations.settings.preview.confirmBeforeOpeningExt: Ask for confirmation before opening links outside Draft.
translations.settings.resetDefaults.description: Reset all settings to their default values? This will be saved immediately.
translations.settings.resetDefaults.title: Reset Settings
translations.settings.statusBar.characterCount.descri: Show the current document character count.
translations.settings.statusBar.cursorPosition.descri: Show the line and column navigation button.
translations.settings.statusBar.fileType.description: Show the Markdown file type indicator.
translations.settings.statusBar.saveStatus.descriptio: Show the current save state button.
translations.settings.statusBar.visibility.descriptio: Show or hide the status bar at the bottom of the app.
translations.settings.statusBar.wordCount.description: Show the current document word count.
translations.settings.title: Settings
translations.shortcuts.actions.app.open.description: Open a Markdown or text file.
translations.shortcuts.actions.app.open.title: Open file
translations.shortcuts.actions.app.save.description: Save the current document, or open Save As when it has no file path.
translations.shortcuts.actions.app.save.title: Save file
translations.shortcuts.actions.editor.continueMarkdow: Continue the current list or quote on the next line.
translations.shortcuts.actions.editor.lowercaseSelect: Convert the selected text to lowercase.
translations.shortcuts.actions.editor.extendSelection: Extend the editor selection one word left.
Extend the editor selection one word right.
translations.shortcuts.actions.editor.addSelectionRan: Add another independent text selection without clearing existing selections. Ctrl + Shift + Alt + double-click adds the clicked word.
Indent an empty Markdown list item.
translations.shortcuts.actions.editor.moveCursorWordL: Move the editor cursor one word left.
translations.shortcuts.actions.editor.moveCursorWordR: Move the editor cursor one word right.
translations.shortcuts.actions.editor.moveLineDown.de: Move the active editor line or selected lines down.
translations.shortcuts.actions.editor.moveLineUp.desc: Move the active editor line or selected lines up.
translations.shortcuts.actions.editor.redo.descriptio: Redo the latest editor change, even when focus is outside the editor.
translations.shortcuts.actions.editor.redo.title: Redo
translations.shortcuts.actions.editor.toggleLineCapit: Toggle the first letter capitalization of the current line.
translations.shortcuts.actions.editor.undo.descriptio: Undo the latest editor change, even when focus is outside the editor.
translations.shortcuts.actions.editor.undo.title: Undo
translations.shortcuts.actions.editor.uppercaseSelect: Convert the selected text to uppercase.
translations.shortcuts.actions.quickInsert.keepOpen.d: Insert the selected Quick Insert item and keep the menu open for the next empty line.
translations.shortcuts.actions.quickInsert.openMenu.d: Open the Quick Insert Menu at the current editor cursor position.
translations.shortcuts.actions.toolbar.bold.descripti: Toggle bold Markdown around the current selection.
translations.shortcuts.actions.toolbar.bold.title: Bold
translations.shortcuts.actions.toolbar.close.descript: Dismiss the floating toolbar selection or cancel an open edit menu.
translations.shortcuts.actions.toolbar.close.title: Close toolbar or edit menu
translations.shortcuts.actions.toolbar.comment.descri: Toggle hidden comment Markdown around the current selection.
translations.shortcuts.actions.toolbar.comment.title: Comment
translations.shortcuts.actions.toolbar.confirmEdit.de: Apply changes in the toolbar's link, image, or preview edit menu.
translations.shortcuts.actions.toolbar.editPreviewSel: Edit the selected preview source Markdown.
translations.shortcuts.actions.toolbar.heading1.descr: Apply the first Markdown heading level.
translations.shortcuts.actions.toolbar.heading1.title: Heading 1
translations.shortcuts.actions.toolbar.heading2.descr: Apply the second Markdown heading level.
translations.shortcuts.actions.toolbar.heading2.title: Heading 2
translations.shortcuts.actions.toolbar.heading3.descr: Apply the third Markdown heading level.
translations.shortcuts.actions.toolbar.heading3.title: Heading 3
translations.shortcuts.actions.toolbar.heading4.descr: Apply the fourth Markdown heading level.
translations.shortcuts.actions.toolbar.heading4.title: Heading 4
translations.shortcuts.actions.toolbar.heading5.descr: Apply the fifth Markdown heading level.
translations.shortcuts.actions.toolbar.heading5.title: Heading 5
translations.shortcuts.actions.toolbar.heading6.descr: Apply the sixth Markdown heading level.
translations.shortcuts.actions.toolbar.heading6.title: Heading 6
translations.shortcuts.actions.toolbar.highlight.desc: Toggle highlight Markdown around the current selection.
translations.shortcuts.actions.toolbar.image.descript: Create or edit a Markdown image for the current selection.
translations.shortcuts.actions.toolbar.image.title: Image
translations.shortcuts.actions.toolbar.inlineCode.des: Toggle inline code Markdown around the current selection.
translations.shortcuts.actions.toolbar.italic.descrip: Toggle italic Markdown around the current selection.
translations.shortcuts.actions.toolbar.italic.title: Italic
translations.shortcuts.actions.toolbar.link.descripti: Create or edit a Markdown link for the current selection.
translations.shortcuts.actions.toolbar.link.title: Link
translations.shortcuts.actions.toolbar.normalText.des: Convert the current line back to normal paragraph text.
translations.shortcuts.actions.toolbar.spoiler.descri: Toggle spoiler Markdown around the current selection.
translations.shortcuts.actions.toolbar.spoiler.title: Spoiler
Toggle strikethrough Markdown around the current selection.
translations.shortcuts.actions.toolbar.underline.desc: Toggle underline HTML tags around the current selection.
translations.updates.checkFailedDescription:
Unable to check for updates. Make sure Draft releases are public and try again.

{message}
translations.updates.checkedAutomatically: Updates are checked automatically at launch.
translations.updates.noUpdateAvailableToInstall: No Draft update is available to install.
translations.updates.onlyInstalledReleases: Updates are only available in installed Draft releases.
translations.updates.openSettingsPrompt: Draft {version} is available. Open Settings to install it from About?
translations.updates.unsavedChangesBeforeInstall: Draft has unsaved work. Save or discard your changes before installing the update.
